title: Naturalization-Related Data and Statistics | USCIS
content:
## Naturalization-Related Data and Statistics
USCIS has data on naturalization including the number of naturalizations, countries of birth of recently naturalized, where they reside in the U.S., how long it takes them to become citizens, and more.
USCIS also has data on naturalization applicants' performance on the Naturalization Test and the population of individuals who are eligible to naturalize.
Naturalization Statistics Find data on the population of recently naturalized.
Naturalization Test Performance Find data on applicants' performance on the Naturalization Test.
Eligible to Naturalize Data Find data on those eligible to naturalize.
